name: functionality_wiring_run_self_test
desc: Run the Functionality Wiring self-test harness. Verifies MCP registry entries, command manifest, bridge action parity, error wiring, skill YAML, and domain naming for every agent (00 through 15). Returns the parsed JSON report and the paths to the on-disk Markdown + JSON artefacts.

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: Optional: stream per-assert output to stderr.

parameters.name: fail_fast
parameters.description: Optional: stop on the first failing assert.
